title: Codex CLI git global options bypass safe command allowlist enabling arbitrary code execution
description: The is_safe_to_call_with_exec function for git commands does not check for global options like --exec-path, --git-dir, --work-tree, --namespace, or --super-prefix that appear before the subcommand. These options can redirect config/repository/helper lookup to attacker-controlled paths, enabling arbitrary code execution through crafted git helper scripts even on otherwise read-only git commands. Found via commit audit of openai/codex: af042737 'Block unsafe git global options from safe allowlist'.
